chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3671 of 2014 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.18678/2014 2. For hearing of main case 05.03.2025 Messrs. Kashif Hanif, Mukesh Kumar G. Karara and Sajid Ali, advocates for the petitioner The order sheets going back to 2014 suggests that this is a covered matter. The orders from 2017 onwards observed that the controversy is squarely covered by the Division Bench judgment of this court reported as 2017 YLR 2015. The observation is repeated several times, however, the respondent has elected not to dispute the same and same is the case today. Learned counsel states that it may be just and proper to dispose of this petition upon the same reasoning and the terms as aforesaid judgment. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
